title: No redundant ARIA role
description: ARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) attributes are used to enhance the accessibility of web content and web applications. These attributes provide additional information about an element’s role, state, properties, and values to assistive technologies like screen readers. In HTML, certain elements have default roles.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Redundant ARIA role. Elements have implicit roles that don't need to be specified.
